## Project Knowledge
# phantomind-monorepo — AI Skills & Context

> Auto-generated by PhantomMindAI. Review and customize as needed.
> Last scanned: 2026-04-01T00:35:29.031Z

## Tech Stack

- **Languages**: TypeScript, JavaScript
- **Runtime**: Node.js
- **Build Tools**: tsc
- **Package Manager**: npm
- **Node.js**: >=18.0.0
- **Project Type**: Monorepo

## Key Commands

- `npm run build` → `npm -w @phantomind/contracts run build && npm -w @phantomind/core run build`
- `npm run dev` → `npm -w @phantomind/core run dev`
- `npm run test` → `npm -w @phantomind/core run test`
- `npm run lint` → `npm -w @phantomind/core run lint`

## Entry Points

- `workspaces → packages/*`

## Naming Conventions

- Functions use camelCase naming (41× found)
- Classes ending with "Provider" suffix (28× found)
- Constants use UPPER_SNAKE_CASE (19× found)
- Classes ending with "Handler" suffix (4× found)
- Classes ending with "Service" suffix (4× found)

## Import Patterns

- Use type-only imports (import type {})
- Use node: protocol for Node.js built-in imports
- Use namespace imports (import * as)

## Architecture Patterns

- Tests co-located with source files
  - e.g. `packages/core/src/adapters/adapters.test.ts`
  - e.g. `packages/core/src/agent/retry.test.ts`
  - e.g. `packages/core/src/config/loader.test.ts`

## Project Conventions

- Workspace package layout present
- Authentication/session patterns present
- Redux-style state management present
- Store-based client state management present
